'''Kn'ik Th'ronik''' was a [[Fnessian]] of that [[Species/Legends|species']] thos [[Gender/Legends|gender]] who [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggled]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and [[Weapon/Legends|weapons]]. At thirty-five [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old, Th'ronik was wanted by the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] for the alleged theft of their [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], the ''[[Morgannier]]'', when it was docked on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. SoroSuub Corporation believed that Th'ronik may have installed an advanced security system on the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] to prevent anyone else from intruding, and they suggested that confirmed sightings could be reported to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officials to receive assistance with apprehending the [[alien]]. The bounty was set at 4,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], [[Death/Legends|dead]] or alive, with a bonus of gems worth 10,000 credits if the ''Morgannier'' was returned in good condition.<ref name="No Disintegrations" />

Th'ronik was said to have an aversion to violence, and instead of battling [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], the being used deception and trickery to evade capture. Along with having known associates, [[Timma Briss]] and [[Bolabo Hujaan]], Th'ronik was suspected of having ties to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="No Disintegrations" />
